title: Add AI Image Generator to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [AI Image Generator](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.monu.aiimagegenerator) to image
- Generate high-quality images from text prompts on Android with AI Image Generator using the Pollinations AI API.

Fixes #9949

gist.headline: Pocket-sized pixels
gist.blurb: The Greenhouse is growing! A new Android app called 'AI Image Generator' just joined the showcase, bringing Pollinations-powered text-to-image magic straight to your phone.
gist.summary: Added the Android app 'AI Image Generator' to the community showcase, highlighting its use of the Pollinations API for mobile text-to-image generation.
gist.impact: Community members can now discover a new mobile tool for generating images on the go, expanding the ecosystem of Pollinations-powered apps.
gist.visual_concept: An Android smartphone displaying generated art, representing the new mobile app. Polly the bee interacting with the phone, perhaps painting on it or holding it up proudly.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot holding a chunky retro smartphone that displays a glowing miniature landscape. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot holding a chunky retro smartphone that displays a glowing miniature landscape. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
